subject: Unable to log in to BEU portal
description: I am trying to log in with my BPS email but it says my account is not found. I am a BEU member at Eastbridge High School.

subject: Cannot download BEU contract PDF
description: The contract document download button does not work in Chrome. I click it and nothing happens. Using Chrome 124 on Windows.

subject: Petition signature not recording
description: I submitted the contract petition twice and neither submission shows up in the portal. Can you check if my data went through?

subject: Grievance form - which category should I use?
description: I need to file a grievance about excessive hall duty assignments but I am not sure which category to select. Is this a contract violation or a working conditions issue?

subject: How do I update my school assignment in the portal?
description: I was transferred from Westside Middle School to Eastbridge High School in October. My profile still shows the old school. How do I update this?

subject: BEU dues deduction missing from June paycheck
description: My June BPS paycheck does not show the BEU dues deduction. I am a full member. Can you confirm my dues authorization is on file?

subject: Portal shows wrong building rep for Eastbridge
description: The portal member directory lists Marcus Wilson as the Eastbridge building rep but David Russo has been the rep since 2022. Please update.

subject: Cannot access archived grievance from 2024
description: I need to reference a grievance filed in March 2024 about hall duty assignments. The portal shows an error when I try to open it.

subject: Request to add co-rep access for Kevin Monteiro
description: I would like to grant Kevin Monteiro co-rep access for the Eastbridge chapter so he can view grievance filings when I am out.

subject: Two-factor auth not working on my phone
description: I set up two-factor auth for my BEU portal account but the codes from my authenticator app do not work. I have tried regenerating them.

subject: BEU contract document search not returning results
description: When I search for the 2024 contract in the document library, nothing comes up. I can find it by browsing but search is broken.

subject: Add BEU newsletter archive to portal
description: Could you add a newsletter archive section to the portal so members can find past issues? We get a lot of requests for old newsletters.

subject: Mobile portal not loading on iPhone
description: The BEU portal homepage does not load on Safari on iPhone 14. It shows a blank white screen. Works fine on desktop.

subject: New member needs orientation materials
description: I joined BEU this September and have not received the new member packet. Can you send me the orientation materials or a link to download them?

subject: Contract campaign rally details not in events calendar
description: The June 17 rally at BPS Central Office is not showing in the BEU portal events calendar. Please add it so members can RSVP.

subject: BEU election results not reflected in portal
description: The May 2026 chapter election results need to be updated in the portal. David Russo was re-elected as building rep.

subject: Grievance submission confirmation email not received
description: I filed a grievance about excessive prep coverages last week and never received a confirmation email. Has it been received?

subject: Request: bulk export of chapter meeting attendance
description: I need to export the chapter meeting attendance records from 2023-2026 for BEU central office. Is there a bulk export option?

subject: Labor contract section 12C missing from portal
description: The portal is showing an older version of the contract. Section 12C on professional development was amended in the 2024 MOU. Please update.

subject: Portal account password reset not working
description: I requested a password reset for my portal account but the reset email never arrived. I checked spam folder too.
